paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32, with a change of -3.95% compared to the prior close and -20.9% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 23, 2026.

There are 2 new news items in the last 24 hours, including a story about Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built near Pantex, and an announcement about the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. Recent news headlines come from sources such as NewsChannel 10 on MSN and PR Newswire.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form announcing the appointment of new officers and an 8-K form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed. Additionally, there are 4 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including mentions of a Google job posting in Amarillo and the latest 8K filing.
